case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VS. VIOLET HICKS et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HICKS, VIOLET THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 440 EDDY STREET, #202, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORIGINAL SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HICKS, VIOLET
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO PLTF'S POSSESSION ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HICKS, VIOLET
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. SERVED JAN-15-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HICKS, VIOLET
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $148.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT HICKS, VIOLET
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HICKS, VIOLET
